title: The Cheese Takeover
body:
This is a mod that adds this stuff to the game:![Stuff it adds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a31ab608e01983bbd753989e9957cc93ef7316ee.png)
Most (all) of this is cursed.

This adds a new block, called "Theidk", a new dimension called the "Ches Dimension", a new food that is called "Cheese", tied with a challenge called "The Cheese Tax", which if you have not seen that meme, you can see it here:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7s1UKDdB0OU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
